props.name: hasLeftAvatarOrIcon
props.comment: Whether to reserve a slot for a left avatar / icon in each skeleton row.

props.name: hasRightAvatarOrIcon
props.comment: Whether to reserve a slot for a right avatar / icon in each skeleton row.

props.name: hasSecondaryText
props.comment: Whether to render a secondary text placeholder under the primary one.

props.name: hasTertiaryText
props.comment: Whether to render a tertiary text placeholder next to the primary one.

props.name: nbFakeLines
props.comment: Number of fake rows to render. Defaults to 5.
